name: G-Switch 4
author: Poki
description: G-Switch 4 takes gravity-defying skills to the next level as the fourth installment in the G-Switch series. This game offers the ultimate gravity-controlling experience you've ever seen! You can play with up to 7 friends in the Multiplayer mode, or explore the G-Switch world solo to uncover its secrets. But here's the real kicker: you can design your own levels and share them with the entire world! No longer limited to the levels created by developers, you can become a game developer yourself, play with friends, or rate levels crafted by other players. Let's flip the gravity! How to play G-Switch 4 ? Switch - Left mouse button / any keyboard key Who created G-Switch 4? G-Switch 4 is created by Serius Games. Play their other games on Poki: G-Switch , G-Switch 2 , and G-Switch 3 ! How can I play G-Switch 4 for free? You can play G-Switch 4 for free on Poki. Can I play G-Switch 4 on mobile devices and desktop? G-Switch 4 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play G-Switch 4 with my friend? Yes! G-Switch 4 is a single or local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same computer!
